exchanges.prompt: Design a multi-cloud architecture using AWS S3 for storage, Azure Functions for compute, and GCP BigQuery for analytics with a Kubernetes orchestration layer

response.content:
flowchart LR
  subgraph External
    U[User]
    IoT[IoT Devices]
  end
  subgraph Cloud_Storage
    S3[(AWS S3)]
  end
  subgraph Cloud_Compute
    AF[Azure Functions]
  end
  subgraph Cloud_Analytics
    BQ[(GCP BigQuery)]
  end
  subgraph Orchestration
    K8s[Kubernetes]
  end
  U -->|request| AF
  IoT -->|telemetry| AF
  AF -->|processed data| S3
  AF -->|event| K8s
  K8s -->|orchestration| AF
  S3 -->|data| BQ
  BQ -->|insights| U
  K8s -->|management| S3
  K8s -->|management| BQ
  AF -->|logs| BQ
  BQ -->|query results| U
